description: A demo infrastructure asset referencing contracted fiber capacity across a metropolitan network loop. Disclosures focus on customer contracts, utilization, and maintenance reserve assumptions.

docs.label: Network summary
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Summarizes route footprint, capacity, and customer contract assumptions.

docs.label: Revenue memo
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative recurring revenue and utilization assumptions.

docs.label: Maintenance report
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Provides demo maintenance reserve and service-level assumptions.
